annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Miss. Code Ann. § 75-17-7 — 8% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Mississippi’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
